criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's core functionality.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's user interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app screenshots

criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique or innovative features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, user reviews

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: App's availability and performance across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: App's handling of user data and implementation of security measures.
criteria.sources: App permissions, privacy policies, user reviews
